alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a secondary alcohol functional group, with the general structure HOC(R)(R') (R,R'=alkyl, aryl).
alternative_parents.name: Secondary alcohols

alternative_parents.description: Organonitrogen compounds that contain a hydroxyl group located on the carbon at the position alpha to a carbonitrile group. They have the general formula RC(OH)C#N.
alternative_parents.name: Alpha-hydroxynitriles

alternative_parents.description: Compounds containing a bond between carbon a pnictogen atom. Pnictogens are p-block element atoms that are in the group 15 of the periodic table.
alternative_parents.name: Organopnictogen compounds

alternative_parents.description: Derivatives of hydrocarbons obtained by substituting one or more carbon atoms by an heteroatom. They contain at least one carbon atom and heteroatom.
alternative_parents.name: Hydrocarbon derivatives

class.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
class.name: Organonitrogen compounds

description: This compound belongs to the class of organic compounds known as cyanohydrins. These are organic compounds containing the cyanohydrin functional group, -C(OH)CN.

direct_parent.description: Organic compounds containing the cyanohydrin functional group, -C(OH)CN.
direct_parent.name: Cyanohydrins

intermediate_nodes.description: Compounds having the structure RC#N; thus C-substituted derivatives of hydrocyanic acid, HC#N.
intermediate_nodes.name: Nitriles

kingdom.description: Compounds that contain at least one carbon atom, excluding isocyanide/cyanide and their non-hydrocarbyl derivatives, thiophosgene, carbon diselenide, carbon monosulfide, carbon disulfide, carbon subsulfide, carbon monoxide, carbon dioxide, Carbon suboxide, and dicarbon monoxide.
kingdom.name: Organic compounds

subclass.description: Organic nitrogen compounds that contain the cyano (C#N) group. The group can be present either in the anionic or covalently bond form.
subclass.name: Organic cyanides

superclass.description: Organic compounds containing a nitrogen atom.
superclass.name: Organic nitrogen compounds
